title: The Metamedium Chronicle
subtitle: Summer 2026: Sculpting Photons & Hardware Luminescence
description: A broadsheet exploring real-time projection mapping, the hardware decay of physical lamps, and the linguistics of light in experimental modern art.

articles.title: Sculpting Photons: Volumetric Projection and Live AI
articles.subtitle: Pushing real-time generative pipelines beyond the screen and into spatial fog.
articles.author: Elena Rostova
articles.coverCaption: Fig 1. Real-time latent space generation mapped onto physical vapor.

articles.title: The Tungsten Crisis: Archiving Hardware-Dependent Light
articles.subtitle: When the meaning of an installation relies on an obsolete projector bulb.
articles.author: Dr. Amara Nwosu
articles.coverCaption: Fig 2. Deprecated halogen fixtures cataloged for preservation.

articles.title: The Syntax of LEDs: Information Density in DMX Protocols
articles.subtitle: Analyzing lighting arrays as a form of comparative literature and computational syntax.
articles.author: Dr. Julian Vance

articles.title: Tactile Luminescence: The Return of the Physical Lamp
articles.subtitle: Why experimental artists are abandoning screens for custom-built kinetic lighting.
articles.author: Marcus Thorne

articles.title: Nocturnal Interfaces in Overnight Spaces
articles.subtitle: Light art designed for the temporal displacement of the night shift.
articles.author: Sari Wijaya
